overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of the Harry Potter Great Hall, featuring thousands of floating candles, long wooden dining tables filled with people, and large stained glass windows at the far end. The camera maintains a static elevated position on the right side, capturing the warm, magical atmosphere with sunlight streaming through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral dining hall with floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the grand hall from an elevated balcony position on the right side

entered.detail: thousands of magical candles suspended in mid-air throughout the ceiling area
large ornate stained glass windows at the far end of the hall emitting warm sunlight
rows of long wooden dining tables filled with seated people
massive cylindrical stone pillar in the right foreground
gothic stone arches along the left wall with windows

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall. Thousands of floating candles illuminate the space above long wooden tables where numerous people are seated dining. Warm sunlight streams through the large stained glass windows at the far end, while a massive stone pillar anchors the right foreground of the shot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a magnificent gothic dining hall filled with a warm, magical glow. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where thousands of floating candles cast a soft light over long wooden tables crowded with dining guests. As the view lingers, the focus emphasizes the contrast between the massive stone pillar anchoring the right foreground and the airy expanse of the hall. The scene then draws the eye toward the far end of the space, where brilliant sunlight streams through large, intricate stained glass windows to illuminate the atmospheric interior.
